title: Transfer Case / 4WD System Calibration
description: Calibrates the transfer case encoder motor after replacement to restore 4WD range selection (2H/4H/4L/N). Required on electric-shift transfer cases — motor must learn its range positions.
common_symptoms: 4WD shift fault after transfer case replacement
physical_solution: Park on level surface. Execute encoder motor calibration routine. Motor finds all range positions (2H, 4H, N, 4L). Verify all ranges engage without grinding.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — $31 encoder learn routine accessible on older body-on-frame platforms (GM pre-2017, Ford pre-2018, Toyota ATC pre-2020). TCCM (Transfer Case Control Module) addresses: Ford 0x760, GM 0x7E3, Toyota 4WD ECU varies. Gateway restrictions on 2018+ Stellantis.
preconditions: No active TCCM DTCs from other causes

procedure_steps.description: Enter TCCM extended session: $10 03. Read current encoder position: $22 [ENCODER_POS_DID]. Position should correspond to current range. If position shows invalid/unknown: encoder motor calibration required.

Execute encoder motor learn: $31 01 [ENCODER_LEARN_ROUTINE]. Routine commands motor to sweep through all positions, locating mechanical stops for each range. Duration: 30-90 seconds. Motor may be heard moving during routine.
After routine: read encoder position again. All range positions should now have valid values. TCCM status should show calibration complete.

RANGE TEST: With vehicle stationary, cycle through 2H → 4H → 4L → 4H → 2H. Each range should engage cleanly with indicator light solid (not blinking). 4-Lo: transmission must be in Neutral for shift on most OEMs.

4-LO ENGAGEMENT TEST: Stop completely. Shift transmission to N. Shift 4WD to 4L (slow lever or button press). Feel/hear transfer case engage (light clunk). Shift back to D. Low range confirmed by RPM-to-speed ratio change.
Clear TCCM DTCs. Road test in 4H: drive 0.5 miles. No 4WD indicator blinking. Shift back to 2H on dry pavement. Clear all 4WD related codes. Verify no C0327/C0379 return.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: ATC (Active Transfer Case) on 4Runner/Tacoma/Tundra. Techstream 'Active Transfer Case' calibration. ELM327 $31 accessible on pre-2020. 4Runner ATRAC system: separate rear differential coupling calibration also needed after rear diff work.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: VTM-4/AWD: not traditional transfer case — rear differential coupling. Honda SH-AWD (MDX/RDX): no user-accessible 4WD ranges. N/A for transfer case calibration.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: ATTESA ET-S (4WD): electronic coupling, not traditional transfer case. CONSULT for ATTESA coupling zero-point calibration. Nissan Armada/Titan: traditional transfer case, CONSULT $31 accessible.
oem_notes.Ford: TCCM (Transfer Case Control Module) on F-150/Super Duty/Explorer. IDS encoder motor learn on 2018+. ELM327 $31 accessible pre-2018. NV271/NV273/BorgWarner BW4419: common on F-150. Electronic shift — always needs encoder learn after replacement.
oem_notes.GM: Electronically-shifted NV246/NVG263 on Silverado/Sierra/Tahoe/Suburban. TCCM encoder learn via GDS2. ELM327 $31 on older platforms (pre-2017). Actuator motor position DID readable for verification.
oem_notes.BMW: xDrive all-wheel drive: transfer case is internal, no user range selection. Different calibration via ISTA for xDrive coupling. Not applicable for traditional 4WD transfer case procedure.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Haldex AWD: coupling unit in rear, no traditional transfer case. 4MOTION calibration via ODIS for coupling adaptation. Not applicable for traditional transfer case. Touareg: permanent AWD, no range selection.
oem_notes.Stellantis: NV244 (Ram 1500), NV246/NV273 (Ram HD, Jeep Wrangler/Grand Cherokee). wiTECH 2018+. ELM327 $31 accessible pre-2018. All electric-shift Chrysler transfer cases require encoder learn after replacement.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: HTRAC AWD: electronic coupling, no traditional transfer case. No encoder motor calibration applicable. Terrain management modes (Snow/Sand) are ECU logic only.
